headline: Madison utility seeks new data center rate to shield regular customers
summary: MGE wants a new rate for data centers to ensure existing customers do not pay for their energy infrastructure.

raw.headline: Madison utility seeks new data center rate to shield regular customers
raw.summary: MGE wants a new rate for data centers to ensure existing customers do not pay for their energy infrastructure.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Xcel Energy, Raises Price Target to $102
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   maintains Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $91 to $102.

raw.headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Xcel Energy, Raises Price Target to $102

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Xcel Energy, Raises Price Target to $94
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   maintains Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $92 to $94.
